hero.title: Celebrating the Elevated Woman
hero.subtitle: When women gather, impact must be felt.

convener.name: Pst. Delphine Nforgwei
convener.title: Pastor, Purpose Coach, Author & Women's Impact Leader
convener.bio: Founder of the E-Woman Conference. Passionate about helping women discover, embrace and boldly walk in their God-ordained purpose.
convener.mission: Helping women redefine empowerment and rise into their full calling, one woman at a time.

about.title: Why E-WOMAN?
about.description: A gathering designed to inspire, equip, and connect women who are ready to walk boldly in their purpose and calling.

speakers.name: Pst. Delphine Nforgwei & Comfort Mussa
speakers.title: Conference Moderators
speakers.topic: Guiding the Conversation with Clarity & Impact
speakers.bio: Pst. Delphine Nforgwei, founder of the E-Woman Conference, and Comfort Mussa, award-winning journalist and founder of Sisterspeak237, bring wisdom, leadership and powerful storytelling to anchor E-WOMAN 2026.

speakers.name: Dr. Almighty Nchafack
speakers.title: Founder, Just Food
speakers.topic: She Owns the Shelf: The Supermarket Blueprint for Cameroon
speakers.bio: Founder of Just Food and impact strategist helping scale African products into mainstream markets.

speakers.name: Dr. Eden A. Onwuka
speakers.title: Master Speaker & Communications Trainer
speakers.topic: Day 1: Healing the Soul Wounds | Day 2: Ignite Your Voice (Authority, Audacity & Authenticity)
speakers.bio: Bestselling author and global keynote speaker helping leaders communicate with clarity and impact across five continents.

speakers.name: Triumph Adekunle
speakers.title: Grace & Poise Coach
speakers.topic: The Power of Presence (Projecting Grace and Confidence in Any Room)
speakers.bio: Internationally regarded leadership strategist shaping confident and values-driven leaders.

speakers.name: Dr. Solange Swiri Tumasang
speakers.title: Leadership Coach & Humanitarian
speakers.topic: Actionable Leadership Skills for Wealth Creation
speakers.bio: Multi-award-winning women's rights advocate empowering women and girls across Africa.

speakers.name: Prudentia Batchankwe
speakers.title: Certified John Maxwell Coach
speakers.topic: Becoming a Woman of Impact: The Journey of Personal Transformation and Growth Necessary to Make a Meaningful Difference in the World
speakers.bio: Dedicated educator and leadership coach passionate about youth empowerment and faith-based leadership.

speakers.name: Rev. Eleanor Olatunde
speakers.title: Founder, The Blazing Altar
speakers.topic: Becoming Her: Walking Boldly in the Woman God Saw When He Made You
speakers.bio: Strategic communications leader and global mentor empowering women to excel in leadership.

speakers.name: Millicent Kangrotmwa Ugo-Alozie
speakers.title: Author & Mentor
speakers.topic: The Spirit of the Elevated Woman: Built in Fire, Not Comfort Zone
speakers.bio: Founder of The Refined Woman Academy and mentor committed to growth and covenant relationships among women.

speakers.name: Dr. Cece Fomenky
speakers.title: Paediatric Endocrinologist & Leadership Coach
speakers.topic: Modern Parenting with Mission & Emotional Intelligence
speakers.bio: Medical leader and educator empowering families and women leaders.

speakers.name: Ma Yaah Gladys Viban
speakers.title: Leadership Advocate
speakers.bio: Distinguished advocate empowering women and youth across Africa through values-based leadership.

speakers.name: AyeeSha Omadibi
speakers.title: Founder, Hustle Africa
speakers.topic: The Power of Your Story: How Women of Faith Can Lead Through Authenticity
speakers.bio: Strategic storyteller and communication architect empowering women entrepreneurs to build influence in the digital age.

testimonials.name: Attendee
testimonials.text: I walked in unsure of my direction. I left with clarity and the courage to move.

testimonials.name: Participant
testimonials.text: For the first time, I felt seen — not just as a woman, but as a leader with purpose.

registration.title: Register for E-WOMAN 2026
registration.subtitle: Secure your seat at the table of purpose.
registration.paymentNote: After payment, send your screenshot via WhatsApp to confirm.

press.title: Press & Media
press.description: Resources for media professionals covering E-WOMAN 2026.
